'''Ghraggka''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] warrior living on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The Wookiee was assigned by [[King/Legends|King]] [[Grakchawwaa/Legends|Grakchawwaa]] to watch over his son, [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Rikummee]]. Ghraggka was unable to save the prince from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]], however. Destroying one [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] in their revenge, more Wookiee warriors came to their aid, allowing Ghraggka to inform the King of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems's]] duplicity and commence with war.<ref name="Deep Forest" />
